title: Safari Adventure Coloring
description: A fun African safari scene featuring four popular animals that children can color while learning about wildlife
instructions: Color each animal using your favorite colors. You can use the learning facts below to help you choose realistic colors, or use your imagination to create a colorful safari!

content.image: A safari scene with a large elephant standing near a water hole, a lion resting under an acacia tree, a tall giraffe reaching for leaves, and a zebra grazing in the foreground. The background shows the African savanna with mountains in the distance.
learningFacts: African elephants are the largest land animals on Earth
Lions live in groups called prides
Giraffes have spotted patterns that are unique like human fingerprints
Zebras have black and white stripes that help protect them from flies
These animals all live in the African savanna
